name: ruby-csv
title: ruby-csv
description:
CSV reader and writer
The CSV library provides a complete interface to CSV files and data. It offers
tools to enable you to read and write to and from Strings or IO objects, as
needed.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-csv because CSV reader and writer.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-csv as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-csv with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-csv --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
